choices.title: You just had to kill her.

choice.title: Ohh, she tripped and cracked her skull.
choice.response: I guess I'll add yours to the mantle.

choice.title: Nice entrance. How did you learn that?
choice.response: I had to spend a few points for that.

choice.title: Hah, many have tried that before.
choice.response: I think you don't quite understand.

choice.title: Oh well, winged or not, you're next.
choice.response: I think you don't quite understand.

choice.title: I hit you, you die and then I'll loot you.
choice.response: And now I know you don't understand.

choice.title: Understand what?
choice.response: What you are experiencing here are...

choice.title: Having hard time finishing a sentence?
choice.response: The last seconds of your miserable existence.

choice.title: Sure, whatever, let's see what you got.
